member.name: T:RecordSplicingResults.DataProcessor
member.summary: A processor class which queries the splicer using methods in OutputHandler and puts the results in a backup-able format.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.DataProcessor.CreateJSON(System.Int32)
member.summary: Queries the splicer for non-image data and serializes it into a JSON.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.DataProcessor.GetImages(System.String)
member.summary: Queries the splicer for prearc, warm splice, and cold images, each in the X and Y views.
member.param: Directory to put the \images\ directory into.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.DataProcessor.SaveBMPasPNG(System.Byte[],System.String)
member.summary: Saving the BMP image that the splicer gives as a png.
member.param: Bitmap image as a byte array.
Path where the png should be stored.

member.name: T:RecordSplicingResults.IUsbFsm100ServerClass
member.summary: An interface used for dependency inversion for the UsbFsm100ServerClass class.

member.name: T:RecordSplicingResults.UsbFsm100ServerAdapter
member.summary: An adapter class for the real splicer, which implements IUsbFsm100ServerClass.

member.name: T:RecordSplicingResults.MockUsbFsm100ServerClass
member.summary: A mock splicer for use in testing.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.OutputHandler.AutoParse(System.String)
member.summary: Takes splicer output fields and parses them into their appropriate datatype (ints, floats, strings).
member.param: Splicer output being parsed.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.OutputHandler.GetSpecificResultFromId(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Uses a regex to match a given identifier with a given result.
member.param: The unprocessed output string from the splicer.
The identifier we want to extract from the output string.
member.returns: The result associated with the given identifier.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.OutputHandler.GetOutputAsDict(System.String,System.String[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sends a query to the splicer and parses the result into a dict.
member.param: Query to send to the splicer.
Identifiers to extract from splicer output.
Whether the desired identifiers need to be concatenated onto the end of the query string.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.OutputHandler.GetSingleResult(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Wrapper for GetOutputAsDict.
member.param: Query to send to the splicer.
Identifier to extract from splicer output.
Whether the desired identifier need to be concatenated onto the end of the query string.

member.name: T:RecordSplicingResults.ParamService
member.summary: A service class which allows for backing up and restoring splice mode parameters, to and from arbitrary directories.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.ParamService.GetSpliceParameters(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets binary image of a given splice mode's parameters.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.ParamService.SetSpliceParameters(System.Int32,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Changes a particular splice mode number's parameters.
member.param: Splice mode to be changed.
A splice mode parameter binary image.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.ParamService.BackupParametersSpecific(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Backs up a specific splice mode's parameters.
member.param: Path to the directory in which to put the parameter backup.
The splice mode (1-300) to be backed up.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.ParamService.BackupAllParameters(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Backs up the parameters for every splice mode.
member.param: Path to the directory in which the backups will go
Boolean representing whether or not to also back up parameters to S3.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.ParamService.RestoreAllParameters(System.String)
member.summary: Takes a backup produced by BackupAllParameters and restores all of the splicer's splice mode parameters.
member.param: Path to the directory containing the splice mode parameter backups.
member.exception: One of the 300 splice mode parameter files doesn't exist.
The filesize for a parameter file is inc

member.name: T:RecordSplicingResults.BackupService
member.summary: Service class that deals with backing up splice data (not mode parameters).

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.BackupService.GetNewSpliceDirectoryPath(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates the appropriate path for the most recent splice.
member.param: Splice mode the most recent splice used.
member.returns: A path of the form: MAIN_BACKUPDIRECTORY\[serial number (splicer name)]\[mode title, e.g. FLEX-SMF]\[date]\[time].

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.BackupService.OpenBackups
member.summary: Opens MAIN_BACKUP_DIRECTORY to the user for easier navigation.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.BackupService.BackupLastSplice
member.summary: Gets the information that the splicer stores about the previous splice (images, cleave/fiber angles, etc) and backs it up to S3/the local filesystem.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.BackupService.BackupSplicesContinuously
member.summary: This is an "automatic mode" which allows the user to back up splices without needing to interact with the CLI.

member.name: T:RecordSplicingResults.StatusHandler
member.summary: A handler class that deals with the splicer's status (connected vs. disconnected, idle vs busy, etc).

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.StatusHandler.SplicerResting(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Checks if the splicer is at a valid state for queries.
member.param: Boolean representing whether this method should print text.
member.returns: A boolean representing if the splicer is resting.

member.name: M:RecordSplicingResults.StatusHandler.TryConnect(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gives the user troubleshooting instructions on how to connect the splicer, if disconnected.
member.param: Boolean representing if a successful connection is printed.
